item.title: Day in the life in Houston
item.description:
As a native Californian with a Texan mama, I found this absolutely hilarious and true!
**FP Edit"* Glad you guys enjoyed this. Thanks for getting it to the front page so others could enjoy it as well :-) my FP wish (as always) is to be kind to each other and all animals. Maybe have a plant-based meal once or twice a week for you and your family. Check out my other posts for some recipe suggestions :-)
item.dc:creator: PlantBasedCJ

item.dc:creator: mocosoft

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
It's time for TheFreePizzaDude!!! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
Gracie says you can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels we all love you so much - https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
My foster Gracie is here to show you how it works for requests
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
14,668 meals since we started 924 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 225 1st by Pizza Angel @houghten 300 2nd, 3rd, 4th and 5th by @OP 335 6th, 7th, 8th and 9th by @OP 415 10th, 11th and 12th by Pizza Angel @whitebbwolf 425 13th by Pizza Angel @hwatL4bloopy 430 14th by Pizza Angel @KittenKatt 435 15th by Pizza Angel @ThatHurts 445 16th, 17th, 18th and 19th by @OP 519 20th by Pizza Angel @scaredshirtless 526 21st by Pizza Angel @RaysMusicExchange 527 22nd by Pizza Angel @TheDildoOfConsequences 534 Michael Jordan by Pizza Angel @kittenkatt 554 Kobe Bryant, 25th, 26th, and 27th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 554 28th, 29th, and 30th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 611 31st by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 629 32nd by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 640 33rd, 34th, 35th and 36th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 700 37th by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 720 38th and 39th by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 730 40th by Pizza Angel @kittenkatt 740 41st and The Meaning of Life, the Universe, and Everything by @OP ... Today's Grocery Tally 420 Blaze it 1st by Grocery Angel @possumly 440 2nd by Grocery Angel @LordLChaim 527 3rd by Grocery Angel @MagickaGaming 700 4th by @OP ... Alright everyone that's it for OP Today we sent out 42 meals Filled 4 huge grocery orders That's 14,710 meals since we started 928 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: It's like The Purge, accept roles have been reversed!
item.description:
Get Bobcat Goldthwait to direct it like he did God Bless America.
Get ready for the opportunity of a lifetime, catching REAL Ratatta's at McDonald's! The timing of this event couldn't be funnier.

item.title: During a live concert, The Warning's main singer Dany forgets the lyrics. Her sister and drummer Pau quickly catches on and takes the lead in her place.
item.description: Talk about a well oiled machine.

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
it was a great show.. her attractiveness was a bonus. greetings online friends
Jenny Craig is an American weight loss company
better snatch that up
that's unsettling
mmm hmm
oh no what is you doing?
pretty much
do it
i guess
haters will say this isn't real
oh, Derek. i have no qualms with you ftr
i have a few concert posters i want to frame.. any alternate options?
someone in the comments will help if you are too young for this one
but it's the hot item this year!
i'm on team rocket
peent
sounds difficult
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Cosplaying done right
item.dc:creator: Cyberball2073

item.title: Witcher 4 - Dark Ciri Cosplay
item.description:
In honor of The Witcher 4 going woke, here is my Dark Ciri Cosplay... Anybody else excited about the announcement trailer this week?? Anyone else also not sure why if you've actually played the Witcher 3 at all - Ciri becoming the main character was pretty much already expected and not really a surprise? Anybody else tired of the word wok meaning nothing but seeing it everywhere?
Well, ignore all that and chill with my Ciri cosplay...
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.description: In the US in the 21st Century, it seems “firearm discharge avoidance fee” might be what it is. alt text: Two-panel meme: Top text "High Marginal Tax Rate" with disgusted face; bottom text "Guillotine Avoidance Fee" with approving face.

item.title: My newest hobby, building unconventional furniture with wood and metal
item.description:
Bookkshelf - shelves slant so the books don't fall over
Just finished today
3-leg cocktail table. Doesn't wobble even on uneven floor tile
New Mexico skies
Simple corner shelves with wall hugging brackets
item.dc:creator: ProCycle

item.title: Black Fungus Flourishing In Chernobyl
item.description: In the ruins of Chernobyl, scientists have discovered a black fungus feeding on deadly gamma radiation, slowly growing toward the reactor core. This mysterious organism, thriving in the abandoned wasteland, is not just surviving but actively absorbing nuclear radiation, as if healing the scar left by one of the world's worst disasters.
item.dc:creator: FucMeInTheAssAndCallMeAPotato
